# Vasyl Bakhmut — Full-Stack Web Developer & AI Automation Specialist

> Melbourne-based full-stack web developer and AI automation specialist
serving small businesses across Australia.

## Services
- Web Design: custom, mobile-first websites from $199 AUD
- Web Development: React, Next.js, TypeScript applications
- AI Chatbots & Automation: n8n workflows, CRM integration, from $99 AUD
- SEO Optimisation: technical SEO, local search, free audit available
- Ecommerce Solutions: custom online stores from $799 AUD
- Business Web Solutions: multi-page business websites from $299 AUD

## Location
Based in Cheltenham, Melbourne VIC 3192, Australia.
Serving Melbourne, Sydney, and businesses Australia-wide.
